County of Marin home page
In January, February, and March of 2026, the Marin County Board of Supervisors will temporarily hold public meetings at the Showcase Theater, 20 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, while audio/visual upgrades occur inside the Board Chamber.

Board Prioritizes Uses for Nearly $10.7 Million in General Fund Year-End Balance
Support for affordable housing and other facilities receives largest allotments during March 10 meeting.

Low-Interest Loans Now Available to Help Cover January Storm Losses
Damage from excessive rain, flooding, and king tides added up to approximately $4.35 million across Marin County.

Your County representatives
The Board of Supervisors establishes policy and adopts legislation to meet community needs.
Each Supervisor represents 1 of 5 districts in the County of Marin.
